_note: Copy this file to private/applicant-profile.json and replace every placeholder with your real values. This file is gitignored and stays local — it is used ONLY to fill application form fields. EEO fields and anything beyond what your resume already states must NEVER appear in a resume or cover letter. Leave any field blank ('') if you prefer not to answer.

identity.emailNote: Professional address used on all applications

eeo._note: EEO fields are strictly optional self-identification for employer diversity reporting. They are NEVER written into a resume, cover letter, or any document the hiring team reads. Fill in, leave blank (''), or set to 'Prefer not to say' — your choice entirely.
eeo.veteranStatus: I am not a protected veteran
eeo.disabilityStatus: I do not have a disability
